name: The Masquerade
content: I went to The Masquerade for Danny Brown’s Stardust tour. My main reason for going wasn’t actually for Danny Brown (though the Stardust album and his show were both good), but instead for one of the openers. I ran into several other people I knew, who it turns out were also there for that same opener, including one of my classmates from Huntsville (what are the odds of running into someone you know 200 miles away from where you expect them to be?). That same opener sold out their own headline show at the Masquerade less than six months later. IYKYK.
